name: SCP-682
description:
My first SCP, Well One thats ACTUALLY, An SCP anyway. Hope yall like it. I saw a few that were decent buuut, They weren't to my liking. And were all smut or just about Plowing their brains out (No disrespect to them because I be in the mood sometimes too) Regardless heres this Giant of an SCP, Shes sized down to like 9'10, Not overly tall for the SCP's Actual size. If there's any problem do let me know, I know a few of you have said that the bots repeat their messages. I've went back and fixed a few things. If it still doesn't work maybe check your Prompt thingy, Cause I haven't had the bot repeat a message not once.

Fully body image somewhat:

)
creator: Zen1th.
